Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave it my all working part-time,[n]attending to customers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I detailed various products[n]to a number of patrons...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I crammed information about charmstones[n]in order to improve my sales pitch...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was taught about the products and[n]their connections to various practices...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I worked hard to serve customers in a store[n]dedicated to relaxation and healing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I worked hard, surrounded by crystals[n]that were glowing mysteriously...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tired customers left the store[n]looking completely rejuvenated...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}All right, I'm going to increase your hourly wage! People need to be rewarded for their hard work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I'm getting the hang of things,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Hey, a customer complimented you earlier. You should work here full-time after you graduate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I've gotten better at my work,[n]they're giving me a slight raise...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 0 10}Here you go. Come by and help out again when you feel like it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After working awhile with spiritual[n]gemstones, my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}[n]and {f 4 30 1 1 1 0} increased...![n]{f 1 1}
